## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / refactor

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## How tested

<!-- Describe how you verified the change. For the Python package: -->

```bash
cd python
uv run ruff check .
uv run pytest -q
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / docs / CHANGELOG) where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII committed
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Change respects the boundaries in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)
